subject: math
title: Evaluate a logarithm with the laws of logs
steps: A difference of logs with the same base is the log of a quotient: log₂(48 / 3).
Divide inside: 48 / 3 = 16, so the expression is log₂ 16.
Write 16 as a power of the base: 16 = 2⁴.
log₂(2⁴) = 4, because the log and the base-2 power undo each other.
